commands.cmd:
devs=$(ls /sys/block) || { echo "sys/block unreadable" >&2; exit 1; }
have_smartctl=0
command -v smartctl >/dev/null 2>&1 && have_smartctl=1
have_jq=0
command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 && have_jq=1
printf '{"results":['
sep=""
for d in $devs; do
  case "$d" in loop*|ram*|dm-*|sr*) continue ;; esac
  rot=$(cat "/sys/block/$d/queue/rotational" 2>/dev/null) || rot=-1
  sectors=$(cat "/sys/block/$d/size" 2>/dev/null) || sectors=0
  size_gib=$(awk -v s="$sectors" 'BEGIN{printf "%.1f", s*512/1073741824}')
  health="unknown"
  if [ "$have_smartctl" = "1" ]; then
    if out=$(smartctl -H --json "/dev/$d" 2>/dev/null); then
      if [ "$have_jq" = "1" ]; then
        passed=$(printf '%s' "$out" | jq -r 'if (.smart_status.passed == true) then "true" elif (.smart_status.passed == false) then "false" else "" end' 2>/dev/null)
      else
        passed=$(printf '%s' "$out" | tr '\n' ' ' | awk 'match($0, /"smart_status"[ \t]*:[ \t]*\{[^}]*"passed"[ \t]*:[ \t]*(true|false)/){ s=substr($0,RSTART,RLENGTH); if (s ~ /true$/) print "true"; else print "false" }')
      fi
      if [ "$passed" = "true" ]; then health="PASSED"; elif [ "$passed" = "false" ]; then health="FAILED"; fi
    fi
  fi
  printf '%s{"device":"%s","rotational":%s,"size_gib":"%s","smart_health":"%s"}' \
    "$sep" "$d" "$rot" "$size_gib" "$health"
  sep=","
done
printf ']}'
